title: profile / canonical résumé contract
description: The canonical semantic résumé doc — the content tokens (slugs for copy) /resume and /resume.json render. Curated from a saved source (e.g. a LinkedIn webarchive), version-controlled, never live-fetched. Site render-context (banner, intro, proof, seeking, nav links) lives in presentation.schema.json, which decorates this doc.

email.description: Canonical contact email — the résumé contact line, the token bag, and the generated JSON Résumé all derive from this.

experience.description: Roles, newest first. Curated from a saved source, not live.

url.description: Canonical org link (e.g. LinkedIn company page).

bullets.description: Detailed achievements — used by the résumé.

url.description: Canonical org link (e.g. LinkedIn school page).

social.description: Canonical identity set — profiles you control. One source for JSON-LD sameAs, rel=me (IndieAuth), the résumé contact line, and the footer 'Elsewhere' line.
